hotkeyPttHint: Press and hold to record, release to stop.
hotkeyToggleHint: Press once to start recording, press again to stop.
hotkeyRecording: Press your desired key or key combination...
autoPasteHint: Automatically paste transcribed text at cursor position.
launchAtLoginHint: Start VoxInk automatically when you log in.
micDeviceHint: Select which microphone to use for recording.
speechDescription: Configure the STT provider, API key, language, and model.
refinementDescription: Use an LLM to clean up transcribed text before pasting.
appearanceDescription: Customize the look and language of VoxInk.
historyDescription: Browse and search your past transcriptions.
testFailed: API key test failed. Please check your key.
saveFailed: Failed to save API key. Please try again.
enableHint: Remove filler words, fix grammar, and add punctuation.
sharedApiKey: Uses the same API key as Speech.
systemPromptHint: Custom instructions for text refinement. Leave empty to use the built-in prompt for the selected language.
resetPromptHint: Restore the built-in default prompt for the current language.
noEntriesHint: Use the global hotkey to start recording.
dictionaryDescription: Add custom terms to improve voice recognition and text refinement.

dict.title: Dictionary
dict.description: Add names, places, and terms to improve voice recognition accuracy.
dict.empty: Add names, places, and terms to improve voice recognition accuracy.
dict.help: Words you add here help the voice engine recognize names, places, and special terms more accurately.
